testsuite.name: com.burnt.mob.IntegrationTest
testsuite.system-out:
💸 Testing fund transfer on XION testnet...
1️⃣ Test Configuration: 🔗 Chain: xion-testnet-2 📡 RPC: https://rpc.xion-testnet-2.burnt.com:443 👤 Sender: xion169cpdh6qvytmn05gx3craeal869p9wcrt7ld5y 🎯 Recipient: xion14yy92ae8eq0q3ezy9nasumt65hwdgryvpkf0a4
2️⃣ Creating client with signer attached... ✅ Client connected with signer attached
3️⃣ Querying sender balance... 💰 Current uxion balance: 958000 uxion
4️⃣ Preparing transaction... 📤 Sending 1000 uxion to xion14yy92ae8eq0q3ezy9nasumt65hwdgryvpkf0a4 📝 Memo: Test fund transfer from Kotlin
5️⃣ Broadcasting transaction... ✅ Transaction broadcast successful! 📝 Transaction hash: F5D65ED1CE02673021A866A94FCBF19D98559814B0589A7D026912DD5D27161E 📊 Code: 0 ✅ Transaction accepted by mempool
6️⃣ Waiting for transaction confirmation (10 seconds)...
7️⃣ Querying transaction result... ✅ Transaction confirmed! 📊 Final code: 0 ⛽ Gas used: 79883 ⛽ Gas wanted: 200000 📏 Block height: 10747457
🎉 Fund transfer test completed!
